positive: A highly detailed, circular badge illustration featuring stylized cosmic woodland. The design incorporates geometric silhouettes of ancient trees, moons, and star clusters. The style should mimic intricate neo-tribal etching art, utilizing clean linework and dot work stippling. Strong contrast is essential. Palette limited to deep midnight blue, matte gold, and cream white. Central, symmetrical composition suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean lines and strong graphic appeal.
